home.title: DreamTeams
home.heroDescription: Innovative service for team formation at IT competitions. All current events aggregated in one place.
home.ctaText: Join the community of participants and create your dream teams today!

about.title: About the Platform
about.description: DreamTeams is an innovative service for team formation at IT competitions, as well as an aggregator of all current events. We strive to simplify the team formation process and provide a centralized platform for finding and participating in competitions.

home.featuresDescription: Everything you need for IT competition participants and organizers

unique.title: No Analogs
unique.description: We are the only platform that connects competition organizers and participants

demand.title: High Demand
demand.description: According to our research, many people participating in competitions need team formation and event aggregation services

transparent.title: Transparent Revenue
transparent.description: Our service earns from organizers posting events, without intrusive advertising or selling user data

rating.title: Rating System
rating.description: The service provides a rating system for organizers and event participants, encouraging users to use our service

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.description: Join the growing community of IT competition organizers and participants

aggregator.title: Event Aggregator
aggregator.description: All IT competitions in one place — no need to search across dozens of websites. Smart filters by date, topic, and format

teams.title: Team Formation
teams.description: Search by skills — find developers, designers, analysts. Participant profiles with tech stacks and achievements

organizers.title: For Organizers
organizers.description: Centralized event publishing, detailed analytics on participants, and targeted audience reach

integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Organizers can integrate their own system with ours through a convenient API

notRegistered.title: You're not registered as an organizer yet
notRegistered.description: Register to start publishing IT competitions and access participant analytics

registered.title: You're registered as an organizer
registered.description: You can publish IT competitions and manage events on the platform

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Switch between light and dark theme

register.title: Organizer Registration
register.description: Fill in your details to get started with the platform
register.headline: New Organizer

organizerName.label: Organizer Name
organizerName.hint: Enter your organization name or your name

form.dataProtection: All data is protected and not shared with third parties

home.title: DreamTeams - IT Competition Aggregator and Team Formation
home.description: Find IT competitions, build teams, compete in events. All competitions in one place with smart participant matching.
